classification_rationale: This release promotes ProductOS to V8.0.0 after the v8 workspace adoption and thread review passed Ralph-loop inspection, validation, fix, and revalidation.
summary: ProductOS V8.0.0 is the stable release for v8 workspace adoption and thread review.
upgrade_actions: Adopt the promoted V8 workspace adoption and thread review in the current ProductOS operating flow.
Use the automatic Ralph-gated release promotion command for future successful slices.
Keep private self-hosting work outside PM product workspaces and promote only reusable repo surfaces.
